amendments.reason: Correct include pattern: actual gate-record filename includes issue prefix (1330-umbrella-arch-drift.json), original include omitted it. Also expand scope to cover the manager-owned seed files only — sub-tracks are implemented in separate PRs on their own branches.

Scope revision: drop #1331 (P1-1 interactive subprocess, too large for overnight autonomous) and #887 (P1-2 resource gating, owner deferral, ARCHITECTURE §6 doc stays as final commitment). Track B repurposed from docs to impl: TypeRegistry filesystem scan (#1332) instead of ARCHITECTURE.md edits. Add Track B impl paths to scope, drop ARCHITECTURE.md from scope.
Include docs/audit/full-audit-latest.json (audit evidence file). Standard ADR-042 audit output path.

check_results.command_or_tool: manager umbrella; impl checks happen in sub-PRs Track A and Track B
check_results.name: manager-coordination-only

adr.rationale: No ADR change. ARCHITECTURE.md edits are owned by Track B docs PR. ADR-020 §3 already matches the proposed Track A engine wrap fix.

changelog.rationale: Manager umbrella has no user-facing surface change of its own; sub-PRs Track A and Track B each handle their own changelog entries if needed.

docs.rationale: Manager umbrella coordinates two impl tracks; sub-PR Track A (engine Collection wrap) and Track B (TypeRegistry filesystem scan) each closed their own gate records with explicit per-doc-class N/A rationales before merging. No public-facing user docs are added or changed at the umbrella level.

owner_directive: REVISED 2026-05-21: scope narrowed to #1330 + #1332 only. #1331 (P1-1 interactive subprocess) and #887 (P1-2 resource gating) deferred — too large for autonomous overnight work; both stay open as standalone issues. Track A impl: engine Collection auto-wrap (#1330, ADR-020 §3). Track B impl (was docs): TypeRegistry add_scan_dir mirroring BlockRegistry, covers <project>/types and ~/.scistudio/types (#1332). Final umbrella PR [DO NOT MERGE] until owner removes prefix.
required_checks: manager coordination only — actual checks run in sub-PRs Track A and Track B
